articles.title: Nintendo Cuts Switch 2 Output by Over 30% on Weak US Sales - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: Nintendo Co. is cutting back the production of Switch 2 after demand for the $450 gaming console trailed the company’s expectations during the year-end holiday season, particularly in the US.

articles.title: Android Auto is breaking for Pixel and Samsung users, and no one knows why - Android Authority
articles.description: Android Auto is widely failing to connect or stay connected, especially on Pixel and Samsung phones. Wired connections appear most affected.
